name: Agent Roster & Weekly Lead-Contact Report — Orange County (Portfolio Demo)

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all(); const REPORT_RECIPIENT = 'demo@example.com'; function escapeHtml(value) { return String(value ?? '') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"'); } function todayLabel() { return new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', }); } const today = todayLabel(); const agents = items .map(item => item.json || {}) .filter(row => row.agentName) .map(row => ({ agentName: row.agentName || '', agentEmail: row.agentEmail || '', slackUserId: row.slackUserId || '', totalLeads: Number(row.totalLeads || 0), urgentCount: Number(row.urgentCount || 0), onTrack: Number(row.onTrack || 0), agentPhotoUrl: row.agentPhotoUrl || '', })) .sort((a, b) => { if (b.urgentCount !== a.urgentCount) return b.urgentCount - a.urgentCount; return b.totalLeads - a.totalLeads; }); const totalAgents = agents.length; const totalLeads = agents.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.totalLeads, 0); const totalUrgent = agents.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.urgentCount, 0); const totalOnTrack = agents.reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.onTrack, 0); const urgentRate = totalLeads > 0 ? Math.round((totalUrgent / totalLeads) * 100) : 0; const topUrgentAgents = agents .filter(a => a.urgentCount > 0) .slice(0, 5); let rowsHTML = ''; for (const agent of agents) { const urgentPct = agent.totalLeads > 0 ? Math.round((agent.urgentCount / agent.totalLeads) * 100) : 0; const statusColor = agent.urgentCount >= 10 ? '#dc2626' : agent.urgentCount >= 5 ? '#f59e0b' : '#10b981'; const avatar = agent.agentPhotoUrl ? `` : `
${escapeHtml(agent.agentName.split(' ').map(p => p[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase())}
`; rowsHTML += ` ${avatar}
${escapeHtml(agent.agentName)}
${escapeHtml(agent.agentEmail)}
${agent.totalLeads} ${agent.urgentCount} ${agent.onTrack} ${urgentPct}% `; } let topUrgentHTML = ''; if (topUrgentAgents.length) { for (const agent of topUrgentAgents) { topUrgentHTML += `
${escapeHtml(agent.agentName)}
${agent.urgentCount} urgent of ${agent.totalLeads} total leads
`; } } else { topUrgentHTML = ` No agents have urgent leads. Great job. `; } const subject = `Agent Follow Up - Orange County - ${today}`; const html = ` ${escapeHtml(subject)}
Skyline Realty Group
Agent Follow Up - Orange
${escapeHtml(today)}
${totalAgents}
Agents
${totalLeads}
Total Leads
${totalUrgent}
Urgent
${urgentRate}%
Urgent Rate
Highest urgent follow-up load
${topUrgentHTML}
Agent Summary
${rowsHTML}
Photo Agent Total Urgent On Track Urgent %
Automated summary generated from FollowUpBoss / Zillow dashboard workflow.
`; return [ { json: { reportRecipient: REPORT_RECIPIENT, subject, html, totalAgents, totalLeads, totalUrgent, totalOnTrack, urgentRate, }, }, ];
